site.title: GrekAI Skills 4 All
site.tagline: A catalog of agent skills, hooks & connectors

items.title: No-Repo Collaborative Deck
items.description: Serverless, AI-driven presentation collaboration. Stateful HTML reads/writes a sidecar state.json synced over a shared cloud folder; an MCP agent rewrites the deck from approved changes. Figma-style comment pins, AI prompt drafts and approvals — no server, no repo.
